api_key.title: Materials Project API Key
api_key.prompt: Paste your Materials Project API key:
api_key.how_to:
How to get your key (free):
1. Open the Materials Project dashboard (link below) and log in / sign up.
2. Click "API".
3. Copy your "API Key" (use "Generate" if there isn't one).
4. Paste it above and click OK.
api_key.saved_msg: Materials Project API key saved successfully!
api_key.invalid_msg: The API key cannot be empty.
api_key.required_cif_msg:
The Materials Project API key is required to download CIF files.
Configure it in 'Settings > Materials Project API Key...'.

stoichiometric.title: Stoichiometric and Solutions Calculator
stoichiometric.equation_label: Enter equation (e.g.: CH4 + O2 -> CO2 + H2O):
stoichiometric.quantities_placeholder: Balance an equation to enter quantities.
stoichiometric.yield_placeholder: Set quantities and identify the limiting reagent.
stoichiometric.copy_results_tooltip: Copy the results box content to clipboard.
stoichiometric.equation_format_info:
Equation Format:
- Use valid symbols (e.g.: H, O, Fe, CH4).
- Indices after element (e.g.: H2O, O2).
- Separate reactants from products with '->', '=' or '=>'.
- Separate species with '+'.
- Do not enter coefficients for balancing.
- Parentheses are supported (e.g.: Ca(OH)2).
stoichiometric.no_reagents: No explicit reagents in equation to enter quantities.
stoichiometric.negative_quantity: The quantity of {formula} cannot be negative.
stoichiometric.invalid_molar_mass: Invalid or uncalculated molar mass for {formula}.
stoichiometric.calc_mm_error: Could not calculate molar mass for {formula}.
stoichiometric.mass_to_moles_error: Failed to convert mass to moles for {formula}.
stoichiometric.convert_error: Could not convert mass of {formula} to moles.
stoichiometric.no_valid_quantities: No valid reagent quantity was entered or there are no reagents.
stoichiometric.limiting_not_found: Could not determine the limiting reagent with the provided data.
stoichiometric.select_product: Please select a product to calculate yield.
stoichiometric.calc_mm_warning: Could not calculate molar mass for product {product}.
stoichiometric.rt_calc_failed: Could not calculate theoretical yield for {product}.
stoichiometric.enter_actual_yield: Please enter the Actual Yield Obtained.
stoichiometric.invalid_yield_number: Invalid numeric value for Actual Yield.
stoichiometric.product_undefined: Product not defined for % yield calculation (MM).
stoichiometric.mm_get_error: Failed to get MM for {product} to convert actual yield.
stoichiometric.mm_convert_error: Could not get molar mass for {product} to convert actual yield.
stoichiometric.mass_convert_error: Failed to convert mass of {product} (actual yield) to moles.
stoichiometric.mass_to_moles_failed: Could not convert mass of {product} (actual yield) to moles.
stoichiometric.percent_calc_failed: Could not calculate percent yield for {product}. Check values (RT may be zero).
stoichiometric.fill_all_fields: Fill all fields to calculate molarity.
stoichiometric.mm_positive: Solute molar mass must be positive.
stoichiometric.volume_zero_after_conversion: Solution volume cannot be zero after conversion to liters.
stoichiometric.check_numeric_values: Check that all numeric values are valid.
stoichiometric.molarity_error: An error occurred in molarity calculation: {error}
stoichiometric.copied_msg: Detailed results have been copied to clipboard.
stoichiometric.export_todo: Export to Excel functionality to be implemented. Use 'Copy Results' button.
stoichiometric.chempy_install_hint:
Chemical equation balancing will not work.
To install, run in your terminal: pip install chempy sympy
